kevlo       2007-07-25 01:25:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/synergy     Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/synergy/files patch-lib__server__CClientProxy1_0.cpp 
                           patch-lib__server__CServer.cpp 
  Log:
  Fix a bug when a Windows XP client sends an invalid mouse position to
  the server at initial connect.
  
  PR: ports/114869
  Submitted by: ehaupt
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
